fields.name: Tax Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the tax area code.
When you set up combinations in the Tax Area window, the program automatically copies the code from the Code field on the header to each new line.
To set up combinations with a different tax area code, first change the code in the header. Click Area, and then List. Select the appropriate code, and then click OK.

fields.name: Jurisdiction Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description from the tax jurisdiction table when you enter the tax jurisdiction code.

fields.name: Calculation Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies an integer to determine the sequence the program must use when tax is calculated.
